creator: usama.cit@gmail.com
text:
Please check following link:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/sys/dev/ral/if_ral_pci.c?view=markup&pathrev=352260#l104
It mentions following code:
        { 0x1814, 0x539f, "Ralink Technology RT5390" },
However, my discussion in following thread:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/ralink-rt5390r-wifi-in-freebsd.72224/#post-440002
shows that the suggested code (by a developer) is following:
 { 0x1814, 0x539b, "Ralink Technology RT5390R" }
Kindly look into this.
